Units.Unit: Unit I: Force Systems and Equilibrium

PYQs.question: Two forces of 300N and 400N act at a point at 60°. Find the resultant and its direction.
State and explain the principle of transmissibility of forces.
Find the support reactions for a simply supported beam with UDL and point load.
A body weighing 500N is hung by two strings. Using Lami's theorem find tensions.
A ladder of weight 200N rests against a smooth wall. Find minimum angle for equilibrium if μ=0.3 at floor.
Derive the relation between angle of friction and coefficient of friction.
Draw SFD and BMD for a simply supported beam carrying UDL over entire span.
A cantilever beam of 4m carries a point load of 10kN at free end. Draw SFD and BMD.

Units.Unit: Unit III: Centroid and Moment of Inertia

PYQs.question: Find the centroid of an L-section with given dimensions.
Determine the centroid of a semicircular area of radius R from its diameter.
State and prove the parallel axis theorem.
Find MI of a T-section about its centroidal axes.
Draw and explain the stress-strain curve for mild steel with all salient points.
A steel rod of 20mm diameter carries a load of 30kN. Find stress and elongation if E=200GPa, L=2m.
Derive the relationship between E, G, and K.
A copper bar is heated from 20°C to 70°C. Find thermal stress if expansion is fully prevented. E=100GPa, α=17×10^-6/°C.
Compare 4-stroke and 2-stroke engines with neat diagrams.
Derive the expression for air-standard efficiency of Otto cycle.
Define brake power, indicated power, mechanical efficiency and their interrelationship.
An engine develops 20kW and consumes 8kg/hr fuel (CV=42000kJ/kg). Find thermal efficiency.
